papers_mined.title: Griot Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Mande jeli griots hereditary; raised from childhood in verbal art + music + genealogy; learn via observation + repetition + guided participation; intensive memorization + mastery of kora/balafon/ngoni.

papers_mined.title: Oral Tradition Hale 1997
papers_mined.note: Practice short repeated passages of actual pieces (not exercises); segments serve as examples of larger compositions; repeated+expanded for technical complexity.

papers_mined.title: Griots Mythlok
papers_mined.note: Intensive apprenticeship under elder griots; oral transmission + memorization + interpretation/adaptation.
